title: Slovakian Oreo Cheesecake
description: A rich and creamy dessert combining the flavors of Slovakia and America in a delightful cheesecake.
instructions: Crush the Oreo cookies in a bowl.
Mix the cream cheese and granulated sugar until smooth.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Pour the cheesecake batter into a 9-inch springform pan.
Add the crushed Oreos on top of the cheesecake batter.
Bake for 55-60 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let the cheesecake cool completely in the pan.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Release the springform pan sides and transfer the cheesecake to a serving plate.
